rationale: Diff (75e82b52..19bc8114) is confined to internal/complete/panel_advisory.go and its test, exactly as briefed. The fix adds a comma-ok present-null check for both refutation_pending_entries and panel_refuted_entries; the absent-key path (comma-ok present==false) falls through unchanged into the same decodePendingEntries/decodeRefutations calls as before — no existing branch was altered, only a new early-return error branch was inserted ahead of each decode call. uncoveredPendingObligations remains the single shared core called by both CheckPendingObligations and reconcilePendingRefutations (verified via grep: reconcilePendingRefutations at line 681 calls the same uncoveredPendingObligations core, no divergent inline logic). Therefore reconcile's behavior on valid inputs (absent keys, valid present arrays, legitimately-covered obligations) is untouched — the new branch only fires on the corrupt present-null shape, which reconcile should also reject under the same fail-closed contract. Test file diff is purely additive (3 new subtests appended after the existing malformed-entry subtest); no pre-existing test assertion was edited. go build ./... clean; gofmt -l and go vet clean; git status --porcelain clean (only the untracked reviews dir). Full suite run: internal/complete, internal/lifecycle, internal/executor, internal/doctor, cmd/mindspec all pass (go test -count=1). No regression found.
